name: Old Fashioned Hamburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Shape the beef into 6 thick patties.
2. In a large heavy skillet, heat 3 tablespoons of butter or margarine.
3. Add the patties and cook to the desired doneness.
4. Meanwhile, stir together the remaining ingredients in a bowl, adding 2 tablespoons of water.
5. Remove the patties to hot plates and make two shallow slashes on each patty.
6. Sprinkle with the spice mixture.
7. Top each patty with 1 teaspoon of butter or margarine.
8. Add 3 tablespoons of water to the skillet, bring to a boil, then pour over the burgers.
9. Serve immediately.
